metadata.description: The ChittyOS ecosystem marketplace — skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for Claude Code. Install standalone or use with Ch1tty for orchestrated MCP management.

plugins.name: chittymarket-manager
plugins.description: Artifact marketplace manager — list, enable, disable, sync, and toggle install modes for all ChittyOS Claude Code artifacts

plugins.name: chittyos-core
plugins.description: Core ChittyOS ecosystem — session persistence, context checkpoints, cleanup, and ecosystem agents for schema, registration, connection, integration, and canonical governance

plugins.name: chittyos-devops
plugins.description: ChittyOS deployment and infrastructure — deploy services, health checks, registry queries, pipelines, wrangler audits, and compliance

plugins.name: chittyos-governance
plugins.description: Canonical governance hooks — entity type validation, ChittyID accountability, deploy gates, PR workflow enforcement, and Neon schema drift detection

plugins.name: chittyos-legal
plugins.description: Legal case management — evidence fact governance, dispute tracking, court docket monitoring, and evidence collection pipeline

plugins.name: chittyos-mcp
plugins.description: ChittyOS MCP gateway (standalone mode) — MemoryCloude, credentials, Notion/Neon queries, ecosystem awareness via mcp.chitty.cc

plugins.name: chittyos-proxy-agents
plugins.description: Remote proxy agents for Notion database operations, ChatGPT integrations, and Cloudflare infrastructure management via agent.chitty.cc. Auth policy: prefer CHITTYAUTH_ISSUED_<SERVICE>_TOKEN, then legacy CHITTY_<SERVICE>_TOKEN.

plugins.name: furnished-condos
plugins.description: Property management — TurboTenant lease templating pipeline, rental document processing, e-signature integration, and RLTO compliance

plugins.name: neon-mcp
plugins.description: Neon PostgreSQL MCP server (standalone mode) — branches, migrations, SQL queries, schema management

plugins.name: chittyhelper
plugins.description: Architectural navigation — ask which service handles X? queries against the ChittyOS ecosystem

plugins.name: chittyagent
plugins.description: ChittyOS session lifecycle — authenticated bootstrap, ecosystem routing, session identity, and Mercury finance

plugins.name: chittycommand
plugins.description: Life management dashboard — query finances, manage disputes, monitor syncs, get AI-powered recommendations

plugins.name: legal-arsenal
plugins.description: Legal case management — evidence standards, chain of custody, adversarial analysis with ChittyStorage integration
